name: HGCA IoT Camera Gateway
desc: IoT camera gateway for HWC modules. 16-node capacity, 470–510 MHz LPWAN, Li battery, 2 MB local storage.
overview: The HGCA IoT Camera Gateway is a concentrator for HWC camera direct-reading modules. It collects data wirelessly from up to 16 nodes (HWC modules), aggregates readings and transmits to the cloud via 4G. Compact form factor for wall or tight-space mounting. Bluetooth for on-site inspection and verification. IP67 rated.
features: Compact enclosure fits any narrow outdoor or utility-room location — installs anywhere with good signal
Wirelessly collects data from pulse water meters and HWC camera direct-reading modules
Triple-sealed potting compound: anti-water, anti-moisture, anti-impact protection
Scheduled meter-reading tasks at configurable time points via central management
"Super-frame + two-way search" protocol for maximum wireless reading reliability
Bluetooth app for on-site commissioning, signal strength verification and data inspection
